▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢

▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ E ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ ▢ ▢ ▢
X X X X X

Then you wait for me to say "What is your next command?", and then you continue with the next step. Take the size of the grid into consideration while giving commands. Only give the command and omit everything else.

What is your next command?
Command: Fill the last row with X

What is your next command?
Command: DONE

Ok. Please do this for the following example, which is a 5 by 5 grid.
Z ▢ ▢ ▢ Z
▢ Z ▢ Z ▢
▢ ▢ Z ▢ ▢
▢ Z ▢ Z ▢
Z ▢ ▢ ▢ Z
What is your next command?
